reasoning: The control CA-2(2) focuses on monitoring and assessing changes to network configurations, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that changes to NetworkPolicies, Ingress, and Egress rules are audited and logged. These checks ensure that any modifications to network configurations within a Kubernetes cluster are tracked, similar to how cloud environments monitor changes to network ACLs, gateways, and route tables.
title: Control Assessments - Control assessments | specialized assessments include as part of control assessm
